text: The balance sheet presents a mixed picture that warrants careful consideration. While total debt of $57.79 billion against stockholders' equity of $32.42 billion yields a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.78, indicating moderate financial leverage risk, the company maintains substantial liquidity with cash and equivalents of $54.71 billion. This results in net debt of only $3.08 billion, providing meaningful financial flexibility. Free cash flow generation appears robust, with Q1 2025 free cash flow margin reaching 41.61%.
